name: @types/archiver
usage_summary: The underlying package 'archiver' is imported in packages/cli-kit/src/public/node/archiver.ts (line 4: `import archiver from 'archiver'`). The archiver package ships no bundled TypeScript types (no 'types' field, no .d.ts in its published files list), so @types/archiver provides the type declarations required for TypeScript compilation. Version is pinned exactly to 5.3.2 matching the underlying archiver@5.3.2.
total_releases_24m_note: Could not fetch npm registry: network access (Bash/WebFetch) was unavailable in this session.
how_to_remove: To remove, you would need to either: (1) replace the 'archiver' dependency with an alternative that ships bundled TypeScript types (e.g. 'archiver' v6+ if it ever adds types, or a different archiving library), or (2) write local ambient declarations in a .d.ts file within cli-kit. The archiver usage is non-trivial — it is used for both zip and tar+brotli compression across packages/cli-kit/src/public/node/archiver.ts — so swapping the underlying library requires validating the archiving API surface.
replacement_reason: The underlying 'archiver' package is actively used and ships no bundled types. @types/archiver is required for TypeScript compilation. Removal would break the build unless the underlying package is swapped for one that bundles types.
